description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Application Tester. In this role, you will support various application security testing initiatives crucial for safeguarding public health technology systems. Your expertise will directly impact the security and integrity of applications used within the Department of Health and Human Services, ensuring they meet essential compliance and testing standards. This remote position allows for flexibility while contributing to vital projects that enhance user safety and system reliability.
\n

Accountabilities
Perform application security testing including dynamic application security testing (DAST), functional testing, and validation testing.
Execute test cases against web applications, APIs, microservices, and cloud-hosted applications.
Identify application-level vulnerabilities including authentication, authorization, input validation, session management, and data exposure weaknesses.
Validate findings from automated scanning tools and identify false positives.
Support secure development lifecycle (SDLC) activities by testing applications before release.
Document application vulnerabilities, test results, and remediation recommendations.
Verify remediation through re-testing and evidence validation.
Support application penetration testing and red team activities as required.
Coordinate testing activities with developers, system owners, ISSOs, and AppSec engineers.
Ensure testing aligns with OWASP Top 10, NIST guidance, and HHS security standards.
Maintain application testing SOPs, workflows, and test scripts.
Support vulnerability management reporting and POA&M evidence development.

Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or related field.
Minimum 4–6 years of experience performing application testing or application security assessments.
Experience testing web applications, APIs, and cloud-based systems.
Working knowledge of OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities and secure application design principles.
Experience validating automated vulnerability scan results.
Familiarity with federal vulnerability management and RMF processes.
Strong analytical, documentation, and communication skills.
Active GTAPT, CEH, or Security+ is preferred.

Benefits
Flexible remote work arrangements.
Opportunities for professional development and training.
Collaborative and supportive team environment.
Engagement in significant public health projects.
Comprehensive health and wellness benefits.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

title: Solution Architect - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Solution Architect - REMOTE. As a Solution Architect, you will play a pivotal role in bridging business needs and engineering execution while integrating and optimizing multi-platform environments. Your expertise in Salesforce, Netsuite, Workday, and Mulesoft will be crucial in designing scalable, reliable, and secure architectural solutions. This role not only requires technical Knowledge but also demands a strategic vision in applying artificial intelligence and machine learning in a seamless manner across these platforms. You'll collaborate with key stakeholders to ensure business objectives are efficiently met through innovative technology solutions in a flexible remote work environment.
\n

Accountabilities
Design end-to-end technical solutions that meet business requirements, ensuring scalability, reliability, and security across the entire application landscape.
Lead the architectural strategy for integrating key business applications, including Salesforce, Netsuite, Workday, and leveraging Mulesoft for enterprise-level integration and API management.
Architect and govern the strategic implementation and integration of AI/ML capabilities within core SaaS platforms, ensuring data readiness and ethical application of models.
Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation, including architecture diagrams, data flow maps, integration specifications, and solution blueprints.
Partner effectively with Product Managers, Delivery teams, and Business Stakeholders to translate strategic initiatives into concrete, actionable technical designs.
Research and evaluate new technologies and tools to enhance the existing architecture and drive innovation across the organization.
Participate in security reviews and compliance audits related to system architecture and data flow.
Mentor junior technical staff on architectural best practices and system complexities.

Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Minimum of 7 years of experience in an architectural role, with significant experience in a high-growth SaaS or technology environment.
Proven expertise in designing and implementing complex integrations between multiple enterprise SaaS applications.
Deep architectural knowledge of Salesforce and at least one other major platform (Netsuite or Workday).
Hands-on experience with an integration platform as a service (Mulesoft preferred) and API-led connectivity principles.
Strong understanding of data modeling, security, governance, and the architectural principles required to support AI/ML initiatives.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to articulate complex technical ideas to both technical and non-technical audiences.

Benefits
Company-wide bonuses based on monthly sales targets.
Employee referral bonuses.
Adoption assistance and tuition reimbursement.
Certification reimbursement and completion bonuses.
A modern, high-tech, and fun work environment.

In this dynamic role, you will contribute to transforming behavioral health care by shaping and enhancing digital products that streamline access, intake, and clinical workflows. Collaborating with various cross-functional teams, you'll translate business needs and user requirements into actionable product features, ensuring that our solutions are effective and meet user expectations. Your strategic input will be vital in designing a product roadmap that prioritizes client accessibility while enhancing overall operational efficiency.
\n

Accountabilities
Support the digital product roadmap focused on client access, intake, and core clinical workflows, in partnership with senior product leadership
Translate stakeholder input into clear user stories, acceptance criteria, and product requirements
Contribute to product discovery by gathering feedback, reviewing data, and documenting insights
Help coordinate release planning, basic QA, and post-release follow-up for assigned features and enhancements
Collaborate closely with Clinical, Operations, Compliance, Marketing, and Research teams to understand needs and refine requirements
Participate in cross-functional meetings, capturing requirements, decisions, and action items
Monitor website and intake funnel performance, identify issues, and escalate as needed

Requirements
5+ years of experience in product management, product operations, business analysis, or a related role within a digital or technology-driven environment
Experience writing user stories, acceptance criteria, and basic functional requirements
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, with the ability to manage multiple small projects or workstreams simultaneously
Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional partners and translate business and user needs into clear, actionable requirements
Experience using project and ticket management tools such as Jira, Asana, Trello, or similar platforms
Basic understanding of technical development processes and systems architecture
Knowledge of cybersecurity and data privacy best practices is a plus

Benefits
Benefit from a 401(k) plan with employer match
Unlimited PTO to support your well-being
Comprehensive healthcare plans, including dental and vision
Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely
Be part of a collaborative and inclusive environment that fosters growth and innovation
Have the opportunity to make a meaningful impact at a fast-growing startup in behavioral telehealth

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

title: Senior Solution Architect - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Solution Architect - REMOTE. As a Solution Architect, you will play a pivotal role in bridging business needs and engineering execution while integrating and optimizing multi-platform environments. Your expertise in Salesforce, Netsuite, Workday, and Mulesoft will be crucial in designing scalable, reliable, and secure architectural solutions. This role not only requires technical Knowledge but also demands a strategic vision in applying artificial intelligence and machine learning in a seamless manner across these platforms. You'll collaborate with key stakeholders to ensure business objectives are efficiently met through innovative technology solutions in a flexible remote work environment.
\n

Accountabilities
Design end-to-end technical solutions that meet business requirements, ensuring scalability, reliability, and security across the entire application landscape.
Lead the architectural strategy for integrating key business applications, including Salesforce, Netsuite, Workday, and leveraging Mulesoft for enterprise-level integration and API management.
Architect and govern the strategic implementation and integration of AI/ML capabilities within core SaaS platforms, ensuring data readiness and ethical application of models.
Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation, including architecture diagrams, data flow maps, integration specifications, and solution blueprints.
Partner effectively with Product Managers, Delivery teams, and Business Stakeholders to translate strategic initiatives into concrete, actionable technical designs.
Research and evaluate new technologies and tools to enhance the existing architecture and drive innovation across the organization.
Participate in security reviews and compliance audits related to system architecture and data flow.
Mentor junior technical staff on architectural best practices and system complexities.

Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Minimum of 7 years of experience in an architectural role, with significant experience in a high-growth SaaS or technology environment.
Proven expertise in designing and implementing complex integrations between multiple enterprise SaaS applications.
Deep architectural knowledge of Salesforce and at least one other major platform (Netsuite or Workday).
Hands-on experience with an integration platform as a service (Mulesoft preferred) and API-led connectivity principles.
Strong understanding of data modeling, security, governance, and the architectural principles required to support AI/ML initiatives.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to articulate complex technical ideas to both technical and non-technical audiences.

Benefits
Company-wide bonuses based on monthly sales targets.
Employee referral bonuses.
Adoption assistance and tuition reimbursement.
Certification reimbursement and completion bonuses.
A modern, high-tech, and fun work environment.

title: Senior Instructional Designer - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Instructional Designer - REMOTE. This role plays a crucial part in developing high-quality courses and curricula focused on medical coding and billing. As part of the Education/Product team, the ideal candidate will blend instructional design expertise with collaborative strategies to create effective and engaging learning experiences. The position requires a deep understanding of instructional design principles, adult learning strategies, and digital content development in a fast-paced, agile environment. A strong proficiency in Articulate Storyline is essential, along with demonstrated experience in integrating AI technologies to enhance educational workflows and learner engagement.
\n

Accountabilities
Collaborate with SMEs to assess learning needs and design instructional strategies.
Create engaging course content for online and hybrid delivery.
Develop comprehensive storyboards outlining course structure and flow.
Utilize expert knowledge of Articulate Storyline for high-quality learning experiences.
Develop assessments that measure learning outcomes and performance improvement.
Translate complex medical concepts into accessible, learner-friendly content.
Manage end-to-end course development processes, including timelines and quality control.
Ensure compliance with accessibility and Section 508 standards.
Conduct iterative quality assurance checks and apply feedback for improvement.
Maintain accurate documentation for instructional materials and processes.
Use rapid prototyping and agile methodologies in content development.
Contribute to continuous improvement through learner feedback and program evaluations.
Collaborate with diverse teams while working U.S. hours.
Adapt curricula for international learners while preserving instructional integrity.
Explore and integrate emerging technologies to enhance instructional efficiency.
Perform additional duties and special projects as assigned.

Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Instructional Design, Educational Technology, or related field.
Master’s degree in Instructional Design or Learning Sciences preferred.
Minimum 5 years of experience in instructional design for adult learning.
Demonstrated proficiency in instructional design models (e.g., ADDIE, SAM).
Expert in eLearning tools such as Articulate 360 and Adobe Creative Suite.
Extensive experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS).
Knowledge of accessibility and 508 compliance requirements.
Excellent written, verbal, and interpersonal communication skills.
Proven ability to manage multiple projects in a remote setting.
Strong organizational and project management skills.
Ability to work collaboratively with diverse stakeholders.
Experience translating technical or medical information into instructional content.
Experience integrating AI technologies to enhance educational content.
Medical coding or healthcare education background is a plus.

Benefits
Flexible remote working conditions.
Opportunities for professional development and continuous learning.
Collaborative and supportive team environment.
Exposure to emerging technologies and innovative practices.
Diverse and inclusive workplace culture.

title: Senior HSE Manager (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a HSE Manager. As you support compliance and risk management in a dynamic production environment, your contributions will significantly impact the overall safety culture. Working closely with various stakeholders, you will facilitate improvements and compliance while fostering collaboration within our dedicated team. Your efforts will be crucial in driving a proactive approach to health and safety, contributing to an organization committed to advanced technology that safeguards people in various environments.

title: Senior Application Tester (REMOTE)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Application Tester. In this role, you will support various application security testing initiatives crucial for safeguarding public health technology systems. Your expertise will directly impact the security and integrity of applications used within the Department of Health and Human Services, ensuring they meet essential compliance and testing standards. This remote position allows for flexibility while contributing to vital projects that enhance user safety and system reliability.
\n

Accountabilities
Perform application security testing including dynamic application security testing (DAST), functional testing, and validation testing.
Execute test cases against web applications, APIs, microservices, and cloud-hosted applications.
Identify application-level vulnerabilities including authentication, authorization, input validation, session management, and data exposure weaknesses.
Validate findings from automated scanning tools and identify false positives.
Support secure development lifecycle (SDLC) activities by testing applications before release.
Document application vulnerabilities, test results, and remediation recommendations.
Verify remediation through re-testing and evidence validation.
Support application penetration testing and red team activities as required.
Coordinate testing activities with developers, system owners, ISSOs, and AppSec engineers.
Ensure testing aligns with OWASP Top 10, NIST guidance, and HHS security standards.
Maintain application testing SOPs, workflows, and test scripts.
Support vulnerability management reporting and POA&M evidence development.

Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or related field.
Minimum 4–6 years of experience performing application testing or application security assessments.
Experience testing web applications, APIs, and cloud-based systems.
Working knowledge of OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities and secure application design principles.
Experience validating automated vulnerability scan results.
Familiarity with federal vulnerability management and RMF processes.
Strong analytical, documentation, and communication skills.
Active GTAPT, CEH, or Security+ is preferred.

Benefits
Flexible remote work arrangements.
Opportunities for professional development and training.
Collaborative and supportive team environment.
Engagement in significant public health projects.
Comprehensive health and wellness benefits.

\n

title: Senior Clinical Review Nurse - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Clinical Review Nurse - REMOTE. In this role, you will leverage your nursing expertise to make a significant impact in the healthcare sector. By focusing on denied insurance claims and crafting compelling clinical arguments, you will empower healthcare facilities to recover lost revenues. This position allows you to work fully remotely, offering flexibility while contributing to the optimization of healthcare revenue cycles. Join a dedicated team that prioritizes patient care and strives to create a supportive environment for both employees and patients alike.
\n

Analyze denied insurance claims and complete medical records.
Apply clinical reasoning, national criteria (InterQual/Milliman), and best practices to determine if appeals are justified.

Stay informed on healthcare regulations, payer trends, and clinical updates.

Requirements
RN License (required)

Certification in Case Management, Legal Nurse Consulting, or Coding is a plus.
Knowledge and experience with national clinical criteria applied in case management including InterQual and Milliman standards.
Experience and knowledge of managed care contracts, account receivables and revenue cycle functions (preferred).
Experience and success in medical record chart review and appealing managed care denials (preferred).

100% Remote: Work from anywhere while making a tangible difference.

title: Senior Business Analytics Manager - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Business Analytics Manager - REMOTE. In this role, you will leverage your analytical expertise to impact the marketing strategies for a diverse portfolio of clients in the restaurant and hospitality industry. You will play a critical role in transforming complex datasets into actionable recommendations, enhancing client narratives, and optimizing business performance. This role offers the opportunity to work collaboratively in a fast-paced agency environment, significantly shaping client engagements with your strategic insights.
\n

Accountabilities
Serve as the primary analytics lead for multiple restaurant clients, partnering with account and client teams.
Translate complex datasets into clear, actionable insights and narratives for clients.
Design and deliver tailored performance reporting and media tests to enhance brand goals.
Manage data integrity by validating data from various sources for accurate reporting.
Analyze campaign performance to optimize engagement and ROI.
Develop guest segmentation models for targeted marketing strategies.
Measure performance across digital media channels and support media team assessments.
Conduct financial analysis of marketing initiatives to guide client investment decisions.

Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Analytics, Statistics, or related field.
5+ years of progressive analytics experience, ideally in an agency or multi-client environment.
Experience in restaurant, hospitality, or retail analytics is highly valued.
Proficiency in SQL, Excel, BigQuery, Google Sheets, and visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, Looker).
Strong understanding of marketing and media metrics (e.g., CPA, ROAS, CTR).
Ability to convey complex analytical findings through effective storytelling.
Experience managing multiple priorities and deadlines across various client accounts.

Benefits

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Backend Software Engineer (Remote). In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to a fast-growing climate tech startup focused on developing sustainable energy solutions. You will help enhance our platform that facilitates the transition towards 24/7 clean energy. Your work will directly impact electricity companies and suppliers, addressing their needs for efficient energy consumption and generation matching. This role is key to further shaping our organizational culture and improving our working methodologies, ensuring a vibrant and inclusive environment.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop, test and release new functionalities for the Energy Platform, focusing on optimizing energy consumption and production.
Collaborate with product teams to define and shape new product features.
Contribute to team culture and improve existing ways of working.

Requirements
3-6 years of professional software engineering experience.
Proficiency in high-level programming languages, preferably including Python, Java, or C#.
Experience in energy or financial markets is a plus.
Strong understanding of team best practices and quality software development.
Fluency in English and excellent communication skills.
Experience in startup and/or remote work environments is desirable.
Familiarity with relational databases, especially Postgres, is advantageous.
Analytical mindset and experience with data manipulation libraries are a plus.

Benefits
Remote-first work environment with options for home office setup.
Minimum of 30 days holiday plus public holidays.
Gym subsidies and access to therapy for physical and mental health.
Transparency in salaries based on seniority and location.
Equity opportunities in a fast-growing company.
Regular all-hands gatherings for team bonding.

\n

title: Remote Fractional Growth Strategist

description_text:

This is not just a job; it's an opportunity to build and scale a healthcare-focused digital marketing agency. You will inherit a strong client base and a capable delivery team, empowering you to develop strategies that drive revenue growth. The role requires defining clear metrics for performance and capitalizing on the established infrastructure. If you're ready to make a significant impact in a collaborative environment, this is your chance to shine.

Set revenue growth targets, build, and execute plans to achieve them
Define market positioning and ideal customer profiles
Productize service offerings into sellable packages
Develop a repeatable pipeline for client acquisition through various channels
Lead sales discussions, presenting solutions, and securing retainers
Manage key client relationships ensuring measurable ROI
Oversee delivery team to maintain quality through process establishment

7+ years of experience in digital marketing, including 3–5+ years in an agency
Demonstrated success in scaling agency revenue and operations
Strong background in healthcare or regulated service marketing
Proven track record of owning and achieving revenue targets
Experience managing offshore teams and establishing standard operating procedures
Ability to engage in senior-level conversations with clients
Must be US-based and authorized to work in the United States

Performance-based compensation with a base retainer plus profit share
Equity-like rewards without equity risk

By optimizing systems and processes, you will enhance performance and service quality, ensuring partners can effectively access and utilize a robust suite of financial services. title: Remote Sales and Marketing Assistant Manager
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Assistant Manager, Sales and Marketing. In this role, you will have the opportunity to drive new business opportunities while managing and maximizing profits for existing accounts. The position demands a proactive approach in coordinating with both local and international clients, while ensuring the seamless operation of export procedures. You will support the sales and marketing team, develop key relationships, and contribute to achieving targeted budgets. This is a pivotal role in shaping the future of our partner's sales strategies in a dynamic environment.
\n

Accountabilities
New account acquisitions are both local and international.
Negotiating competitive rates with full container loads/less container loads, and transport service providers and carriers.
Managing and maximizing the profits of individual and assigned accounts.
Coordinating with overseas agents and ensuring smooth operation of export procedures.
Developing and managing relationships with key customer accounts and carriers.
Coordinating with shippers and recovering outstanding payments within agreed credit terms.
Preparing and conducting sales and marketing presentations and proposals.
Handling Air freight shipments, freight rate negotiations, and monitoring operations.
Resolving contractual and commercial disputes.
Supporting the sales and marketing team.
Achieving and exceeding individual set budgets.
Monitoring monthly checklists of the department.

Requirements
A diploma or degree related to Transport or Logistics & Supply Chain Management with 5+ years of experience in the freight forwarding and logistics industry.
Experience in a business development or sales position with an existing customer base.
Good presentation and negotiation skills.
Proven track record of success in business development or a sales role within the freight forwarding industry.
Knowledge in Sales & Marketing, Sea freight, Air freight Operations, and Export Documentation.
Proficiency in computer applications such as MS Office, MS Word, and MS PowerPoint.

Benefits
Flexible remote working environment.
Opportunity for career growth and advancement.
Collaborative and empowering work culture.
Engaging and dynamic team environment.

title: Remote Field Medical Advisor (Senior)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Field Medical Advisor - REMOTE. In this role, you will play a critical part in shaping the narrative around innovative therapies aimed at addressing serious diseases. By becoming an expert in the medical and scientific realms of new treatments, you'll leverage your scientific knowledge to engage with key opinion leaders (KOLs) and healthcare professionals (HCPs). Your ability to communicate complex concepts will not only inform stakeholders but also enhance collaboration across various functions. As part of a team dedicated to transformative healthcare solutions, your contributions will be pivotal in advancing clinical development initiatives and enhancing patient outcomes.
\n

Accountabilities
Become an SMA and apitegromab medical/clinical/scientific expert
Build and foster relationships with local, regional, and national KOLs and possibly payers
Effectively deliver medical/clinical/scientific presentations to a diverse external audience
Support clinical development activities including investigator recruitment and education
Develop and execute the Territory Management Plan (TMP) aligned with overall Medical Goals
Contribute to qualitative and quantitative MSL reports and SOPs/Business Practices
Respond to unsolicited medical information requests from field teams
Partner with Sales and Market Access for high-level regional engagement

Requirements
MD, PharmD, or PhD preferred
Minimum of 7 years of experience as an MSL or similar role in biotech or pharma
Native or Business Fluent German Speaker; Fluency in English preferred
Experience in neurology and/or rare disease, with prior launch experience preferred
Knowledge of regulatory, commercial and clinical issues in the pharmaceutical industry
Excellent verbal and written communication and presentation skills
Demonstrated strategic planning and project management abilities
Ability to collaborate effectively across geographic areas and functions

Benefits
Remote position with extensive overnight travel (>50%) required
Opportunity to make a significant impact in the field of healthcare
Collaboration with innovative professionals and thought leaders
Access to cutting-edge research and development resources
Commitment to compliance, ethics, and scientific standards

title: Remote General Counsel
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a General Counsel - REMOTE. In this role, you will be crucial in overseeing all legal, regulatory, and compliance issues across the organization. Acting as a trusted advisor to the CEO and executive team, you will help manage risks and ensure compliance while supporting strategic initiatives. Your contributions will shape the legal framework as the company grows and will directly influence operational excellence and patient outcomes in the healthcare sector.
\n

Accountabilities
Advise on corporate governance, fundraising, and equity matters.
Draft, review, negotiate, and advise on contracts including NDAs and partnership agreements.
Ensure compliance with healthcare laws including HIPAA and applicable CMS rules.
Develop internal controls for compliance and work closely with product and engineering teams.
Advise on legal risks associated with clinical operations and telehealth delivery.
Serve as legal partner for strategic initiatives such as M&A and new product launches.

Requirements
J.D. from an accredited U.S. law school and active license to practice law.
8–12+ years of legal experience with a mix of top law firm and in-house roles.
Deep knowledge of regulatory frameworks: HIPAA, AKS, Stark, CMS programs.
Experience in executing payer and healthcare provider contracts.
Business-minded and comfortable in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.
Excellent communicator with strong judgment and high integrity.

Benefits
Make a tangible impact on the future of healthcare and patient outcomes.
Work with a team of healthcare visionaries and technology leaders.
Thrive in an environment that values bold ideas and operational excellence.

title: Remote IT Ticketing Manager
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an IT Ticketing Manager. In this role, you will oversee the internal ticketing ecosystem, ensuring efficient workflows for support requests. Your contributions will bridge technical teams and the broader organization, enhancing productivity and resolving issues effectively. Serve as the primary business owner and administrator for our internal ticketing ecosystem and critical IT applications.
Maintain a backlog of feature requests, prioritize enhancements, and communicate the roadmap to stakeholders.
Build and maintain complex automated workflows, triggers, and business rules for ticket categorization and prioritization.
Use APIs and middleware to connect the ticketing system with other enterprise tools.

5 years of dedicated ServiceNow administration experience, including troubleshooting and identifying system bottlenecks.
Experience building complex automated workflows and configuring custom dashboards for tracking KPIs.
Ability to translate business needs into technical requirements when communicating with non-technical teams.

title: Remote QA Engineer
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Software Test Engineer. In this role, you will contribute to ensuring software quality through advanced automation techniques. Collaborating with cross-functional teams, your expertise in Python will be essential as you design and implement robust automated testing strategies. Join a diverse team of professionals from around the world, and bring your innovative spirit to help deliver high-quality software solutions.
\n

Accountabilities
Design, develop, and maintain robust and scalable test automation frameworks and test suites using Python.
Implement automated testing strategies for APIs and ML/AI models, ensuring accuracy, performance, and reliability.
Collaborate with developers, product managers, and other QA engineers to define test strategies and ensure comprehensive test coverage.
Analyze complex software systems to identify opportunities for automation to improve testing efficiency.
Execute automated test scripts, report defects, and work closely with development teams for timely resolution.
Monitor and maintain test automation environments, ensuring stability and reliability.
Mentor and guide junior QA engineers in best practices for test automation and API testing.
Continuously evaluate and adopt new tools and technologies to enhance testing processes.
Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to improve code quality.
Contribute to the overall QA strategy, driving continuous improvement initiatives within the team.

Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
Minimum of 5 years of experience in software quality assurance, with a focus on automation testing.
Proficiency in Python for writing API automation.
Experience using Playwright and Python for performing UI testing.
Experience testing Web Service APIs with manual and automation tools (Postman, JMeter, SoapUI, etc.).
Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work in a remote, team-oriented environment.
Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies is a plus.
Certification in software testing (e.g., ISTQB) is desirable but not required.

Benefits
Your growth is our growth. We invest in your future with paid training and other professional opportunities.
We’re industry innovators at the forefront of change, equipped with the latest technologies.

title: Remote Instructional Designer
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Instructional Designer - REMOTE. This role plays a crucial part in developing high-quality courses and curricula focused on medical coding and billing. As part of the Education/Product team, the ideal candidate will blend instructional design expertise with collaborative strategies to create effective and engaging learning experiences. The position requires a deep understanding of instructional design principles, adult learning strategies, and digital content development in a fast-paced, agile environment. A strong proficiency in Articulate Storyline is essential, along with demonstrated experience in integrating AI technologies to enhance educational workflows and learner engagement.
\n

Accountabilities
Collaborate with SMEs to assess learning needs and design instructional strategies.
Create engaging course content for online and hybrid delivery.
Develop comprehensive storyboards outlining course structure and flow.
Utilize expert knowledge of Articulate Storyline for high-quality learning experiences.
Develop assessments that measure learning outcomes and performance improvement.
Translate complex medical concepts into accessible, learner-friendly content.
Manage end-to-end course development processes, including timelines and quality control.
Ensure compliance with accessibility and Section 508 standards.
Conduct iterative quality assurance checks and apply feedback for improvement.
Maintain accurate documentation for instructional materials and processes.
Use rapid prototyping and agile methodologies in content development.
Contribute to continuous improvement through learner feedback and program evaluations.
Collaborate with diverse teams while working U.S. hours.
Adapt curricula for international learners while preserving instructional integrity.
Explore and integrate emerging technologies to enhance instructional efficiency.
Perform additional duties and special projects as assigned.

Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Instructional Design, Educational Technology, or related field.
Master’s degree in Instructional Design or Learning Sciences preferred.
Minimum 5 years of experience in instructional design for adult learning.
Demonstrated proficiency in instructional design models (e.g., ADDIE, SAM).
Expert in eLearning tools such as Articulate 360 and Adobe Creative Suite.
Extensive experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS).
Knowledge of accessibility and 508 compliance requirements.
Excellent written, verbal, and interpersonal communication skills.
Proven ability to manage multiple projects in a remote setting.
Strong organizational and project management skills.
Ability to work collaboratively with diverse stakeholders.
Experience translating technical or medical information into instructional content.
Experience integrating AI technologies to enhance educational content.
Medical coding or healthcare education background is a plus.

Benefits
Flexible remote working conditions.
Opportunities for professional development and continuous learning.
Collaborative and supportive team environment.
Exposure to emerging technologies and innovative practices.
Diverse and inclusive workplace culture.

\n

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Quality Assurance Support - REMOTE. In this role, you will be pivotal in ensuring the quality of software products through systematic testing and validation processes. title: Remote Instructional Designer Position
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Instructional Designer - REMOTE. This role plays a crucial part in developing high-quality courses and curricula focused on medical coding and billing. As part of the Education/Product team, the ideal candidate will blend instructional design expertise with collaborative strategies to create effective and engaging learning experiences. The position requires a deep understanding of instructional design principles, adult learning strategies, and digital content development in a fast-paced, agile environment. A strong proficiency in Articulate Storyline is essential, along with demonstrated experience in integrating AI technologies to enhance educational workflows and learner engagement.
\n

Accountabilities
Collaborate with SMEs to assess learning needs and design instructional strategies.
Create engaging course content for online and hybrid delivery.
Develop comprehensive storyboards outlining course structure and flow.
Utilize expert knowledge of Articulate Storyline for high-quality learning experiences.
Develop assessments that measure learning outcomes and performance improvement.
Translate complex medical concepts into accessible, learner-friendly content.
Manage end-to-end course development processes, including timelines and quality control.
Ensure compliance with accessibility and Section 508 standards.
Conduct iterative quality assurance checks and apply feedback for improvement.
Maintain accurate documentation for instructional materials and processes.
Use rapid prototyping and agile methodologies in content development.
Contribute to continuous improvement through learner feedback and program evaluations.
Collaborate with diverse teams while working U.S. hours.
Adapt curricula for international learners while preserving instructional integrity.
Explore and integrate emerging technologies to enhance instructional efficiency.
Perform additional duties and special projects as assigned.

Bachelor's degree in Instructional Design, Educational Technology, or related field.
Master’s degree in Instructional Design or Learning Sciences preferred.
Minimum 5 years of experience in instructional design for adult learning.
Demonstrated proficiency in instructional design models (e.g., ADDIE, SAM).
Expert in eLearning tools such as Articulate 360 and Adobe Creative Suite.
Extensive experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS).
Knowledge of accessibility and 508 compliance requirements.
Excellent written, verbal, and interpersonal communication skills.
Proven ability to manage multiple projects in a remote setting.
Strong organizational and project management skills.
Ability to work collaboratively with diverse stakeholders.
Experience translating technical or medical information into instructional content.
Experience integrating AI technologies to enhance educational content.

In this pivotal role, you will oversee a substantial caseload in a dynamic legal environment, ensuring the efficient management of complex litigation cases. title: Remote Communications Sustainment Analyst
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Communications Sustainment Analyst. This role is crucial for maintaining effective communication during the sustainment phase of the VA Electronic Health Record modernization. By collaborating with various stakeholders, including deployment sites and leadership, the analyst will play a pivotal role in ensuring operational continuity and stakeholder alignment. The impact of this position extends to effectively managing change communications, enhancing the user experience, and shaping the future of health IT services for veterans. This position offers the opportunity to work remotely while contributing to significant initiatives.
\n

Accountabilities
Lead and coordinate sustainment communications for VA sites, including EHR system alerts, newsletters, and SharePoint content.
Support the transition from deployment to sustainment, ensuring sites are prepared for long-term management.
Collaborate with VA, Oracle Health, and site communications teams to align messages with EHRM-IO objectives.
Facilitate meetings, manage action items, and report on communications metrics.
Support briefings and respond to inquiries from VA leadership, Congressional stakeholders, and media.
Define, document, and refine sustainment communications processes and provide feedback on deliverables.
Manage weekly Joint Sustainment and Adoption Advisory Board (JSAAB) notifications and ad hoc communications requests.

Requirements
Experience with project life cycle management, change management, or enterprise communications.
Strong stakeholder communication and risk management skills.
Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field or 10+ years of equivalent experience.
Preferred: VA or EHR system experience, federal IT communications, and sustainment support.

Benefits
Paid time off
Federal holidays
401(k)
Health/dental/vision coverage
Remote-first flexibility
Opportunities for long-term career growth supporting veterans and federal health IT modernization.

title: Remote Clinical Review Nurse
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Clinical Review Nurse - REMOTE. In this role, you will leverage your nursing expertise to make a significant impact in the healthcare sector. By focusing on denied insurance claims and crafting compelling clinical arguments, you will empower healthcare facilities to recover lost revenues. This position allows you to work fully remotely, offering flexibility while contributing to the optimization of healthcare revenue cycles. Join a dedicated team that prioritizes patient care and strives to create a supportive environment for both employees and patients alike.
\n

Accountabilities
Analyze denied insurance claims and complete medical records.
Apply clinical reasoning, national criteria (InterQual/Milliman), and best practices to determine if appeals are justified.
Draft persuasive, medically sound appeal letters that clearly support the need for treatment or services.
Collaborate with the legal team to ensure appeals are compelling and complete.
Stay informed on healthcare regulations, payer trends, and clinical updates.

Requirements
RN License (required)
5+ years of acute hospital experience (required)
Certification in Case Management, Legal Nurse Consulting, or Coding is a plus.
Knowledge and experience with national clinical criteria applied in case management including InterQual and Milliman standards.
Experience and knowledge of managed care contracts, account receivables and revenue cycle functions (preferred).
Experience and success in medical record chart review and appealing managed care denials (preferred).

Benefits
100% Remote: Work from anywhere while making a tangible difference.
Competitive Salary: $65,000–$85,000 per year (commensurate with experience).

title: Remote Clinical Review Nurse Position
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Clinical Review Nurse - REMOTE. In this role, you will leverage your nursing expertise to make a significant impact in the healthcare sector. By focusing on denied insurance claims and crafting compelling clinical arguments, you will empower healthcare facilities to recover lost revenues. This position allows you to work fully remotely, offering flexibility while contributing to the optimization of healthcare revenue cycles. Join a dedicated team that prioritizes patient care and strives to create a supportive environment for both employees and patients alike.
\n

Accountabilities
Analyze denied insurance claims and complete medical records.
Apply clinical reasoning, national criteria (InterQual/Milliman), and best practices to determine if appeals are justified.
Draft persuasive, medically sound appeal letters that clearly support the need for treatment or services.
Collaborate with the legal team to ensure appeals are compelling and complete.
Stay informed on healthcare regulations, payer trends, and clinical updates.

Requirements
RN License (required)
5+ years of acute hospital experience (required)
Certification in Case Management, Legal Nurse Consulting, or Coding is a plus.
Knowledge and experience with national clinical criteria applied in case management including InterQual and Milliman standards.
Experience and knowledge of managed care contracts, account receivables and revenue cycle functions (preferred).
Experience and success in medical record chart review and appealing managed care denials (preferred).

Benefits
100% Remote: Work from anywhere while making a tangible difference.
Competitive Salary: $65,000–$85,000 per year (commensurate with experience).
Robust Benefits Package: 401(k) with corporate match, comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance.
Work-Life Balance: Flexible schedule and paid time off.
Career Growth: Access to professional development, mentorship, and upward mobility within a thriving company.
Additional Perks: Life insurance and performance-based bonuses.

title: Remote Data and AI Architect
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Data and AI Architect. In this pivotal role, you will lead the technical evolution of a robust Data & AI platform, impacting 35,000+ customers across over 140 countries. Your expertise will help architect a unified IT operations backbone that handles massive-scale distributed systems and real-time analytics. Collaborating with modern technologies, you will tackle architectural challenges while mentoring teams and influencing product strategy, making a significant mark on the company's success.
\n

Accountabilities
Lead the architecture, design, and evolution of a modern Data & AI platform.
Define scalable, resilient data architectures for diverse data types across analytics, AI/ML, and operational workloads.
Design and optimize data storage and distributed query layers using technologies such as Apache Spark and Trino.
Drive adoption of OLAP and analytical query engines for low-latency analytics and real-time dashboards.
Establish best practices for data modelling, indexing, partitioning, and query optimization.
Define standards for batch and streaming ingestion and data lifecycle management.
Ensure seamless integration of analytical systems with data lakes and BI tools.
Own performance benchmarking, capacity planning, and operational excellence.
Mentor engineering teams, fostering a culture of technical excellence.
Partner with cross-functional leaders to align technical strategy with business goals.
Manage relationships with cloud providers to support platform operations.

Requirements
Proven technical leader with experience in designing and delivering cloud-based Data & AI platforms at scale.
Ph.D. or MS in Computer Science (highly regarded but not necessary).
12+ years of software engineering experience, including 3+ years in an Architect or Principal role.
Strong background in large-scale data platforms and distributed systems.
5+ years building high-performance data systems, with hands-on expertise in performance tuning.
Experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern data platforms such as Snowflake.
Solid software engineering and system design skills, proficient in multiple programming languages.
Excellent communicator with experience mentoring senior engineering talent.

Benefits
Competitive compensation
Pension Scheme
Employee's Provident Fund
Private healthcare
Paid maternity and paternity leave

In this role, you will be instrumental in validating data integrity, accuracy, and performance across various data platforms. Your expertise will drive the success of AI and analytics initiatives, ensuring products achieve the highest standards of quality and reliability. Lead efforts in validating data pipelines, machine learning models, and analytics platforms.
Design and implement automated testing frameworks for big data on Microsoft Azure.
Develop automated validation for data quality, schema, lineage, and model performance.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a keen attention to detail.

Experience testing data ingestion pipelines and real-time processing.

description_text:

In this role, you will own analytics and reporting from end-to-end, transforming complex business requirements into clean, actionable insights. You'll become a subject-matter expert on operational data, building dashboards and reports in Omni to support decision-making across teams. This position offers the opportunity to impact business decisions significantly and to work collaboratively with leadership, internal teams, and customers.
\n

Accountabilities
Become an SME on the existing database and table structures to support ad-hoc and ongoing analytical needs
Work with rich operational datasets, including transactional tables, pre-aggregated summaries, and denormalized reporting views
Build and maintain dashboards and reports in Omni (or similar BI tools)
Own new reporting requests end-to-end—clarifying requirements, selecting the right analytical approach, and updating existing dashboards
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and reliability across all reports and visualizations
Partner with stakeholders across departments to deliver actionable insights
Write and update SOPs, guides, and documentation

Requirements
2–3+ years experience with BI tools (Looker, Omni, Mode, Metabase, Sigma) building and maintaining dashboards
2+ years of intermediate SQL experience (joins, CTEs, aggregations, window functions)
Proven data visualization skills and portfolio of work
Client-facing experience with professional written communication
Strong analytical skills and attention to detail
Systems-minded thinker who can quickly learn new tools
Experience analyzing/reporting on large datasets from multiple sources
Experience with AI tools or prompt-based problem-solving
Familiar with Google Workspace and Slack
Ability to work PST hours (9am–5pm PT)

Benefits

Bonuses including Anniversary Bonus for service milestones and Attendance Bonus for perfect attendance
Paid Time Off: 7 holiday PTO + 6 annual PTO days

title: Remote Data and AI Strategist
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Data and AI Architect. In this pivotal role, you will lead the technical evolution of a robust Data & AI platform, impacting 35,000+ customers across over 140 countries. Your expertise will help architect a unified IT operations backbone that handles massive-scale distributed systems and real-time analytics. Collaborating with modern technologies, you will tackle architectural challenges while mentoring teams and influencing product strategy, making a significant mark on the company's success.
\n

Accountabilities
Lead the architecture, design, and evolution of a modern Data & AI platform.
Define scalable, resilient data architectures for diverse data types across analytics, AI/ML, and operational workloads.
Design and optimize data storage and distributed query layers using technologies such as Apache Spark and Trino.
Drive adoption of OLAP and analytical query engines for low-latency analytics and real-time dashboards.
Establish best practices for data modelling, indexing, partitioning, and query optimization.
Define standards for batch and streaming ingestion and data lifecycle management.
Ensure seamless integration of analytical systems with data lakes and BI tools.

Requirements
Proven technical leader with experience in designing and delivering cloud-based Data & AI platforms at scale.
Ph.D. or MS in Computer Science (highly regarded but not necessary).
12+ years of software engineering experience, including 3+ years in an Architect or Principal role.
Strong background in large-scale data platforms and distributed systems.
5+ years building high-performance data systems, with hands-on expertise in performance tuning.
Experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern data platforms such as Snowflake.
Solid software engineering and system design skills, proficient in multiple programming languages.
Excellent communicator with experience mentoring senior engineering talent.

Own the monthly burn forecast and maintain a <5% variance towards net-zero target.

Partner with the CEO for evaluating new marketplace initiatives.

6+ years of experience in Strategic Finance, Investment Banking, or FP&A in fintech or marketplace.

In this role, you will have the opportunity to drive new business opportunities while managing and maximizing profits for existing accounts. The position demands a proactive approach in coordinating with both local and international clients, while ensuring the seamless operation of export procedures. You will support the sales and marketing team, develop key relationships, and contribute to achieving targeted budgets. This is a pivotal role in shaping the future of our partner's sales strategies in a dynamic environment.

New account acquisitions are both local and international.
Negotiating competitive rates with full container loads/less container loads, and transport service providers and carriers.

Coordinating with shippers and recovering outstanding payments within agreed credit terms.
Preparing and conducting sales and marketing presentations and proposals.

Resolving contractual and commercial disputes.
Supporting the sales and marketing team.
Achieving and exceeding individual set budgets.
Monitoring monthly checklists of the department.

A diploma or degree related to Transport or Logistics & Supply Chain Management with 5+ years of experience in the freight forwarding and logistics industry.
Experience in a business development or sales position with an existing customer base.
Good presentation and negotiation skills.
Proven track record of success in business development or a sales role within the freight forwarding industry.
Knowledge in Sales & Marketing, Sea freight, Air freight Operations, and Export Documentation.
Proficiency in computer applications such as MS Office, MS Word, and MS PowerPoint.

title: Remote Brand Marketing Manager
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Brand Manager - REMOTE. In this role, you will be responsible for the strategic planning, development, execution, and optimization of consumer awareness and engagement for aesthetic products and services. You will lead omnichannel campaigns in collaboration with various teams and will have the opportunity to create impactful consumer experiences. Your expertise in content marketing and relationship management with opinion leaders will be essential to drive brand loyalty and engagement. This role offers the chance to influence brand strategy while working in a fast-paced environment that adapts to stakeholder needs.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage the execution of consumer marketing plans.
Identify opportunities for brand PR integration in consumer engagement.
Contribute to the consumer journey mapping with the digital team.
Act as brand steward and relationship manager for key influencers.
Participate in strategic planning for consumer engagement programs.
Collaborate with internal and external parties to ensure project success.
Lead projects and coordinate with cross-functional teams.
Execute consumer marketing initiatives and develop brand campaigns.

Requirements
Master’s degree with 2+ years of related experience, or Bachelor’s degree with 4+ years of related experience.
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing or Advertising preferred.
5+ years of experience in professional, agency, or consumer marketing.
Experience in pharmaceuticals, biotech, or aesthetics is a plus.
Strong project management skills and the ability to work independently.
Creative and strategic thinking capabilities.
Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.
Ability to manage agency partners and marketing budgets.

Benefits
Competitive compensation including base salary and an annual performance bonus.
Flexible unlimited PTO, holidays, and 12 weeks of parental leave.
Generous healthcare benefits and employer HSA contributions.
401k match and tuition reimbursement.
Wellness discounts and other perks.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

title: Remote Account Executive Position
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Account Executive - REMOTE. In this role, you will drive the expansion of the network of cardiology practices. Your responsibilities will include building strong relationships, managing a structured sales process, and successfully closing partnership agreements. You'll need to navigate complex dynamics while maintaining a clear focus on measurable results, making a tangible impact on our growth and the quality of care in cardiology.
\n

Accountabilities
Own and close a defined territory of cardiology practices.
Manage a clear account list and execute territory plans.
Maintain stringent pipeline hygiene with CRM and forecasting.
Build trust with cardiologists and practice decision-makers.
Communicate value-based economics effectively.
Hit and exceed activity targets, including meetings and demos.
Collaborate with Marketing to enhance lead flow and conversion.

Requirements
5–10+ years in healthcare sales with physician groups.
Proven track record of quota attainment.
Strong ability to articulate ROI and operational efficiency.
Mastery of sales processes including objection handling.
High credibility and strong executive presence.
Results-driven and motivated by achieving sales numbers.
Knowledge of value-based care or cardiology preferred.

Benefits
Remote work flexibility with potential for travel.
Opportunity to drive significant impact in cardiology.
Collaborative and innovative company culture.
Supportive environment focused on professional growth.
Access to advanced technology and resources.

title: Mid-Level Backend Engineer - remote
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Backend Software Engineer (Remote). In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to a fast-growing climate tech startup focused on developing sustainable energy solutions. You will help enhance our platform that facilitates the transition towards 24/7 clean energy. Your work will directly impact electricity companies and suppliers, addressing their needs for efficient energy consumption and generation matching. This role is key to further shaping our organizational culture and improving our working methodologies, ensuring a vibrant and inclusive environment.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop, test and release new functionalities for the Energy Platform, focusing on optimizing energy consumption and production.
Collaborate with product teams to define and shape new product features.
Contribute to team culture and improve existing ways of working.

Requirements
3-6 years of professional software engineering experience.
Proficiency in high-level programming languages, preferably including Python, Java, or C#.
Experience in energy or financial markets is a plus.
Strong understanding of team best practices and quality software development.
Fluency in English and excellent communication skills.
Experience in startup and/or remote work environments is desirable.
Familiarity with relational databases, especially Postgres, is advantageous.
Analytical mindset and experience with data manipulation libraries are a plus.

Benefits
Remote-first work environment with options for home office setup.
Minimum of 30 days holiday plus public holidays.
Gym subsidies and access to therapy for physical and mental health.
Transparency in salaries based on seniority and location.
Equity opportunities in a fast-growing company.

title: IT Ticketing Manager - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an IT Ticketing Manager. In this role, you will oversee the internal ticketing ecosystem, ensuring efficient workflows for support requests. Your contributions will bridge technical teams and the broader organization, enhancing productivity and resolving issues effectively. Additionally, you will manage the Intranet developments to promote employee communication. This is a pivotal position that will have a significant impact on optimizing internal processes.
\n

Accountabilities
Serve as the primary business owner and administrator for our internal ticketing ecosystem and critical IT applications.
Maintain a backlog of feature requests, prioritize enhancements, and communicate the roadmap to stakeholders.
Build and maintain complex automated workflows, triggers, and business rules for ticket categorization and prioritization.
Use APIs and middleware to connect the ticketing system with other enterprise tools.
Act as Level 2/3 support for platform issues, performing root cause analysis when needed.

Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field; or equivalent practical experience.
5 years of dedicated ServiceNow administration experience, including troubleshooting and identifying system bottlenecks.
Experience building complex automated workflows and configuring custom dashboards for tracking KPIs.
Ability to translate business needs into technical requirements when communicating with non-technical teams.

description_text:

In this role, you will be pivotal in ensuring the quality of software products through systematic testing and validation processes. Opportunity to polish your German language skills in a supportive environment.

title: Remote Application Testing Specialist
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Application Tester. In this role, you will support various application security testing initiatives crucial for safeguarding public health technology systems. Your expertise will directly impact the security and integrity of applications used within the Department of Health and Human Services, ensuring they meet essential compliance and testing standards. This remote position allows for flexibility while contributing to vital projects that enhance user safety and system reliability.
\n

Accountabilities
Perform application security testing including dynamic application security testing (DAST), functional testing, and validation testing.
Execute test cases against web applications, APIs, microservices, and cloud-hosted applications.
Identify application-level vulnerabilities including authentication, authorization, input validation, session management, and data exposure weaknesses.
Validate findings from automated scanning tools and identify false positives.
Support secure development lifecycle (SDLC) activities by testing applications before release.
Document application vulnerabilities, test results, and remediation recommendations.
Verify remediation through re-testing and evidence validation.
Support application penetration testing and red team activities as required.
Coordinate testing activities with developers, system owners, ISSOs, and AppSec engineers.
Ensure testing aligns with OWASP Top 10, NIST guidance, and HHS security standards.
Maintain application testing SOPs, workflows, and test scripts.
Support vulnerability management reporting and POA&M evidence development.

Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or related field.
Minimum 4–6 years of experience performing application testing or application security assessments.
Experience testing web applications, APIs, and cloud-based systems.
Working knowledge of OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities and secure application design principles.
Experience validating automated vulnerability scan results.
Familiarity with federal vulnerability management and RMF processes.
Strong analytical, documentation, and communication skills.
Active GTAPT, CEH, or Security+ is preferred.

Benefits
Flexible remote work arrangements.
Opportunities for professional development and training.
Collaborative and supportive team environment.
Engagement in significant public health projects.
Comprehensive health and wellness benefits.

\n

title: Paralegal Manager (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Paralegal Manager. In this pivotal role, you will oversee a substantial caseload in a dynamic legal environment, ensuring the efficient management of complex litigation cases. This fully remote position provides the flexibility to handle cases across multiple counties, requiring a detail-oriented individual with strong organizational capabilities. As a key player, you will supervise a team, support attorneys directly, and contribute to the overall effectiveness of the firm’s operations.
\n

Accountabilities
Manage a caseload of approximately 100 active litigation cases, ensuring all deadlines are met and documents are properly filed.
Oversee and supervise two staff members, offering training, mentorship, and workflow coordination.
Assist two attorneys in all aspects of litigation, including discovery, trial preparation, and case management.
Draft pleadings, discovery requests and responses, motions, subpoenas, and other legal documents.
Maintain consistent client communication and handle case updates efficiently.
Coordinate depositions, mediations, and trial logistics.
Ensure compliance with Illinois state court procedures, particularly in Cook, DuPage, and Will Counties.
Utilize strong technology skills to streamline case management processes and improve operational efficiency.

Requirements
Minimum of 5 years of litigation experience, preferably within personal injury law.
Strong understanding of Illinois civil litigation procedure.
Proven experience managing staff and supporting multiple attorneys simultaneously.

description_text:

In this pivotal role, you will oversee a substantial caseload in a dynamic legal environment, ensuring the efficient management of complex litigation cases. Proven experience managing staff and supporting multiple attorneys simultaneously.
Exceptional communication, organization, and time management skills.

As a Solution Architect, you will play a pivotal role in bridging business needs and engineering execution while integrating and optimizing multi-platform environments. Your expertise in Salesforce, Netsuite, Workday, and Mulesoft will be crucial in designing scalable, reliable, and secure architectural solutions. Deep architectural knowledge of Salesforce and at least one other major platform (Netsuite or Workday).

Strong understanding of data modeling, security, governance, and the architectural principles required to support AI/ML initiatives.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to articulate complex technical ideas to both technical and non-technical audiences.

title: Sr. Product Designer (Contract - Remote / Los Angeles, CA preferred)
description_text:
Everlywell is a digital health company pioneering the next generation of biomarker intelligence—combining AI-powered technology with human insight to deliver personalized, actionable health answers. We transform complex biomarker data into life-changing insights—seamlessly integrating advanced diagnostics, virtual care, and patient engagement to reshape how and where health happens.

Over the past decade, Everlywell has delivered close to 1 billion personalized health insights, transforming care for 60 million people and powering hundreds of enterprise partners. In 2024 alone, an estimated 1 in 86 U.S. households received an Everlywell test, solidifying our spot as the #1 at-home testing brand in the country. And we’re just getting started. Fueled by AI and built for scale, we’re breaking down barriers, closing care gaps, and unlocking a more connected healthcare experience that is smarter, faster, and more personalized.

We’re hiring a Senior Product Designer with deep visual-design skills to own the look-and-feel of a number of new patterns and pages. You’ll guide work from first insight to pixel-perfect delivery, partnering closely with product, engineering, brand, and leadership to ship experiences that people love—and that measurably improve lives. 

We’re in the middle of updating our brand and evolving our design system—and this next phase is all about creating new patterns, motion, and interaction foundations that will scale with the product. This work will shape how our experiences look, feel, and move for years to come—and we’re just getting started.
\n

You'll be responsible for:
Scalable consumer experiences: designing web experiences that are intuitive, conversion-focused, and built to scale across our growing product portfolio
Design system development: building and documenting Figma components and patterns that bring our refreshed brand to life
High-fidelity craft: delivering polished UI, interactive prototypes, and production-ready specs that set the bar for quality
Cross-functional partnership: collaborating with product, engineering, and brand to shape solutions and ship work that moves the needle
User insight integration: conducting usability tests, synthesizing feedback, and iterating designs based on real user behavior

Why this role is exciting:
Craft matters here. We believe high-quality design isn't decoration. Thoughtful interaction design, typography, and visual polish directly impact comprehension, trust, and outcomes
Meaningful work. Your designs will directly shape how millions of people access and experience diagnostic testing
Range of work. From web design to brand design to design systems, there's variety in what you'll tackle
Collaborative team. You'll work alongside a talented design lead and cross-functional partners who care about getting the details right

What we're looking for:

6+ years designing for web and mobile, with an inspiring portfolio that shows thoughtful design and a passion for craft
Visual design depth. You sweat the details on typography, color, spacing, and motion
Design systems experience. You've contributed to and worked within Figma component libraries
Prototyping skills. Proficiency in Figma and other platforms to bring ideas to life
Clear communication. You can present work, give and receive feedback, and collaborate across functions
Growth mindset, low-ego, and a sense of humor.

Even better if you have:
Healthcare or healthtech experience
E-commerce or conversion-focused design background
Motion design and video skills
Experience in rapidly scaling startups
You care about craft. The micro-interactions matter to you

\n
Apply with your resume + portfolio. We can't wait to see how you bring complex problems to life through beautiful, human-centered design.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Product Designer will be responsible for designing scalable consumer web experiences and developing a design system that reflects the refreshed brand. They will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality, user-centered designs.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 6+ years of experience in web and mobile design, with a strong portfolio showcasing their design skills. Experience with design systems, prototyping, and clear communication is essential, along with a growth mindset and a passion for craft.

Everlywell is a digital health company pioneering the next generation of biomarker intelligence—combining AI-powered technology with human insight to deliver personalized, actionable health answers. We transform complex biomarker data into life-changing insights, seamlessly integrating advanced diagnostics, virtual care, and patient engagement to reshape how and where health happens.

Over the past decade, Everlywell has delivered close to 1 billion personalized health insights, transforming care for 60 million people and powering hundreds of enterprise partners including 8 of the top 10 largest health plans in the U.S. From chronic condition management to preventive screening, our customizable remote-based solution helps close critical care gaps and deliver measurable health outcomes at scale. Backed by a nationwide clinical network, integrated lab, and AI-powered platform, Everlywell enables seamless, at-home care that meets today's needs and leads the way into tomorrow's healthcare.
